fields.label: PL Number
fields.description: Auto-fetched on save. Editable — type to override or fill manually.

fields.label: Drawing Number
fields.description: Auto-fetched on save. Editable — type to override or fill manually.

fields.label: Current Drawing Revision
fields.description: Auto-fetched from PEPL Product Master. Read-only — managed in Product Master.

fields.label: Current Specification
fields.description: Auto-fetched from PEPL Product Master. Read-only — managed in Product Master.

fields.label: Vendor Approval Stage
fields.description: Auto-fetched from Vendor Approval Status. Read-only — managed in VAS DocType.

fields.label: Quantity
fields.description: Quantity of this item being tendered. EDITABLE.

fields.label: Estimated Unit Price (INR)
fields.description: EDITABLE: Customer's published estimated price per unit, if available. Multiplied by quantity to get Estimated Total Value (which is auto-calculated).

fields.label: Estimated Total Value (INR)
fields.description: Auto: quantity x estimated unit price

fields.label: Linked Cost Sheet
fields.description: Created via 'Create Cost Sheet' button when this module is built

fields.label: Our Bid Unit Price (INR)
fields.description: EDITABLE: The price at which we are bidding. Multiplied by quantity to get Our Bid Total (auto-calculated).

fields.label: Our Rank
fields.options:
L1
L2
L3
L4
L5
Disqualified

fields.label: Competitor Analysis
fields.description: Click on this row to expand and add competitors. Each competitor row: enter name, their bid price, and their rank (L1/L2/L3...)
